title: LA VLOG 🍵 travelling alone, busy days in my life, productivity apps, erewhon & escaping winter blues
description:
Hello Friends!

happy sunday, we are ending off 2025 with juuuuust one more travel vlog. i went on a solo trip to LA for the apple app awards showcase! but i had some time to eat, shop and explore. i visited a few popular spots i've seen online like, community goods, erewhon, the brandy melville at the grove etc. i hope you enjoy this solo trip vlog and let me know what you want to see in my next video hehe ❤️

love you 1.28M,
bre

MENTIONED:
